protocols.Paper_title: Maturation of the Gag core decreases the stability of retroviral lipid membranes
protocols.Evidence: VLPs were produced, purified through sucrose cushions, re-suspended, stored cold, and assayed for homogeneity by DLS.

protocols.Paper_title: Maturation of the Gag core decreases the stability of retroviral lipid membranes
protocols.Evidence: Biosensor stability studies exposed captured VLPs to detergent solutions; a wash between injections was described.

protocols.Paper_title: Maturation of the Gag core decreases the stability of retroviral lipid membranes
protocols.Evidence: Western blot detection described VLP detergent treatment and lysis in SDS-containing sample buffer before SDS-PAGE.

protocols.Paper_title: Maturation of the Gag core decreases the stability of retroviral lipid membranes
Maturation of the Gag core decreases the stability of retroviral lipid membranes
protocols.Evidence: Detection of detergent-mediated rupture of viral membranes using an optical biosensor; Triton X-100 shown.

protocols.Paper_title: Maturation of the Gag core decreases the stability of retroviral lipid membranes
protocols.Evidence: VLP membranes were treated with a panel of indicated detergents and optical resonance signals were normalized.

protocols.Paper_title: Maturation of the Gag core decreases the stability of retroviral lipid membranes
protocols.Evidence: Prolonged exposure of VLP membranes to Triton X-100 or Tween 20 on a Biacore biosensor chip.

protocols.Paper_title: Maturation of the Gag core decreases the stability of retroviral lipid membranes
protocols.Evidence: VLPs were incubated with Tween 20, Triton X-100, or Empigen, then analyzed by SDS-PAGE and immunoblotting.
